The overall framework follows the mask-level segmentation Transformer approach.
The image encoder utilizes a Swin-base Transformer as its backbone.
The Swin-base Transformer has a pre-trained weight on the ImageNet dataset.
The image decoder is derived from the Mask2Former architecture.
The decoder consists of nine proposed BWG components.
The Transformer queries are fused with the ×4 resolution image features for predictions.
These settings remain the same as in the original Mask2Former without further tuning.
The optimizer is Adam with an initial learning rate of 1 × 10^(-4).
The weight decay value is set to 0.05.
Training terminates after 50 epochs.
